description_long: This is a round, white ceramic plate with a slightly raised rim, featuring a serving of coiled sausage garnished with thinly sliced red onions and green herbs. The plate also holds a decorative radish carved into a flower shape and a small bunch of leafy greens, likely arugula or parsley, arranged to one side. The surface of the plate is lightly speckled with brown seasoning or sauce, adding a rustic touch. The sausage appears browned and juicy, with visible grill marks and a glistening surface. The radish flower is intricately cut, showing attention to detail in presentation. The overall arrangement suggests a carefully plated dish, suitable for a restaurant or urban food market setting.
description: A white ceramic plate with a coiled sausage, sliced onions, a carved radish flower, and leafy greens, all artfully arranged with a rustic seasoning sprinkle.
description_view_0: The plate is seen with the sausage and onions in the center, leafy greens prominently in the foreground.
description_view_1: The leafy greens and carved radish flower are more visible, with the sausage curving around them.
description_view_2: The radish flower and greens are centered, with the sausage forming a partial ring around them.
description_view_3: The sausage and onions are in the foreground, with the greens and radish flower to the right.
